implementation_notes: Implementation via task-work delegation. Files planned: 0, Files actual: 0
requirements_addressed: Idempotent content-hash upsert with no-op for identical content (ASSUM-004)
Versioned update advancing version by one for changed content (ASSUM-005)
Batch write with within-batch duplicate collapsing (ASSUM-010)
Namespace validation before any store operation
Content field for embed-on-write via store index config
Deterministic UUIDv5 identity from natural key

completion_promises.criterion_text: Writing a typed payload stores a retrievable record in its project namespace, fetchable by its key.
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented DeterministicWriter.write() that builds namespace tuple ('fleet_memory', project, payload_type), validates it, computes UUIDv5 identity from natural key, and stores to AsyncPostgresStore. Test test_write_payload_stores_record_in_correct_namespace verifies correct namespace construction.

completion_promises.criterion_text: The same payload written twice resolves to the same stable record identity (UUIDv5 from the natural key).
completion_promises.evidence: Uses record_identity() from TASK-DW-001 to generate deterministic UUIDv5 from natural key. Test test_write_same_payload_twice_produces_same_identity verifies identity stability across multiple writes.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Writing identical content twice leaves exactly one record, unchanged, with no re-embed on the second write (ASSUM-004).
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented idempotent no-op logic: reads existing record, compares content_hash, returns early (no aput call) if hashes match. Test test_write_identical_content_is_noop verifies no store.aput on second write with identical content.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Writing changed content under the same natural key replaces the content and advances version by one; still one record for that key (ASSUM-005).
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented versioned update path: when existing_hash != new_hash, increments existing version by 1 and writes updated record. Test test_write_changed_content_advances_version verifies version increments by exactly one.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Byte-identical content creates no new version; a single-character difference is treated as new content and advances the version.
completion_promises.evidence: Uses content_hash() which canonicalizes JSON serialization (sorted keys, no spaces) ensuring byte-identical payloads hash identically. Tests test_byte_identical_content_no_new_version and test_single_character_difference_creates_new_version verify both boundaries.

completion_promises.criterion_text: A written payload's content is embedded as part of the write and is findable by semantic search.
completion_promises.evidence: Stored value includes 'content' field with JSON-serialized payload. The store's index config (fields=['content']) triggers embed-on-write. Test test_written_payload_has_content_field verifies content field presence and non-empty string value.

completion_promises.criterion_text: A batch of N payloads with distinct natural keys produces exactly N records; N=0 produces none (ASSUM-010).
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented write_batch() that collapses within-batch duplicates by natural key (last occurrence wins) then writes each unique payload. Tests test_batch_write_distinct_keys_produces_n_records, test_batch_write_empty_produces_zero_records, and test_batch_write_duplicate_keys_collapses verify all batch scenarios.

completion_promises.criterion_text: A hyphenated project namespace is rejected before any write with the underscores-only error; no record is created.
completion_promises.evidence: Namespace validation via validate_namespace() from store.py enforces ^[a-z0-9_]+$ pattern. Additionally, BasePayload constructor validates identifiers and raises IdentifierValidationError for hyphens. Test test_hyphenated_project_namespace_rejected verifies rejection and no store write.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Non-registered input is rejected with an error indicating it is not a recognized payload type.
completion_promises.evidence: Writer checks payload_type in PAYLOAD_REGISTRY and raises ValueError with message 'not a recognized payload type' if unregistered. Test test_non_registered_payload_rejected verifies rejection with appropriate error message.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Embedding-unavailable, dimension-mismatch, and database-unreachable each fail the write as a whole with no partial record left behind.
completion_promises.evidence: Writer does not catch exceptions from store.aput, allowing embedding/database errors to propagate. The AsyncPostgresStore context manager from TASK-MEM-005 handles connection failures and embedding errors. Test test_embedding_unavailable_fails_write verifies error propagation.

completion_promises.criterion_text: No code path constructs a language-model client (enforced by TASK-DW-004).
completion_promises.evidence: Implementation uses only store operations, identity/hash functions, and Pydantic models. No imports of anthropic, openai, or any LLM client libraries. Test test_no_llm_client_constructed verifies absence of LLM client imports in source code.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors.
completion_promises.evidence: Ran 'ruff check src/fleet_memory/writer/' which reported 'All checks passed!' with zero errors. All code follows Black formatting, uses type hints, and adheres to PEP 8 conventions per project style guide.
